# Python virtual environment
.venv/
venv/
env/

# Python-generated files
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*.pyo
*.pyd

# Jupyter temporary files
.ipynb_checkpoints/

# ESC-50 dataset
data/raw/ESC-50/

# Generated feature files
data/processed/
!data/processed/.gitkeep

# Trained models
models/*.joblib
models/*.pkl
!models/.gitkeep

# Generated outputs
outputs/
*.log

# VS Code and IDE settings
.vscode/
.idea/

# Streamlit secrets
.streamlit/secrets.toml

# Windows and macOS files
Thumbs.db
Desktop.ini
.DS_Store
